---
title: "Lecture Slides"
page-layout: full
---

## Slide Decks by Module

All slides are built with **Quarto + reveal.js** and rendered to portable, self-contained HTML suitable for D2L upload or direct browsing. Each deck includes:

- **Dark/light theme toggle** (click the button, top-right corner)
- **Speaker notes** (press `s` during playback)
- **PDF** (a rendered `.pdf` ships alongside each deck; or open the deck with `?print-pdf` appended to the URL and print from the browser)
- **Keyboard navigation** (arrow keys, spacebar; `?` for help)

| Module | Topic | Status | Decks |
|--------|-------|--------|-------|
| 1 | **Linear Models & Least Squares** | Ready | [Setup & Model]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m1-linear-least-squares/m1a-setup-and-model.html) · [Normal Equations]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m1-linear-least-squares/m1b-normal-equations.html) · [Appendix: Matrix Calculus]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m1-linear-least-squares/appendix-matrix-calculus.html) |
| 2 | **Generalization** | Ready | [Evaluation & Cross-Validation]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m2-generalization/m2a-evaluation-cv.html) · [Bias–Variance & Ridge]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m2-generalization/m2b-bias-variance-ridge.html) |
| 3 | **MLE & Parameter Uncertainty** | Ready | [Likelihood & MLE]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/m3a-likelihood-mle.html) · [Properties of the MLE]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/m3b-mle-uncertainty.html) · [Appendix: Covariance]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/appendix-covariance.html) |
| 4 | **Bayesian Inference** | Ready | [Priors & Beta-Binomial]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m4-bayesian-inference/m4a-bayes-beta-binomial.html) · [Conjugate Gaussian Posterior]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m4-bayesian-inference/m4b-gaussian-posterior.html) |
| 5 | **Approximate Inference & Bayesian Classification** | Ready | [Logistic Regression & Newton]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m5-approximate-inference/m5a-logistic-newton.html) · [Laplace & Sampling]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m5-approximate-inference/m5b-laplace-sampling.html) |
| 6 | **SVM & Clustering** | Ready | [Maximum-Margin Classification]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m6-svm-clustering/m6a-svm.html) · [k-means & the Unsupervised Turn]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m6-svm-clustering/m6b-kmeans-clustering.html) |
| 7 | **PCA** | Ready | [PCA & Course Synthesis]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m7-pca/m7a-pca.html) |

Each module also has a landing page listing its decks:
[M1]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m1-linear-least-squares/) · [M2]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m2-generalization/) · [M3]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/) · [M4]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m4-bayesian-inference/) · [M5]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m5-approximate-inference/) · [M6]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m6-svm-clustering/) · [M7]({{< var slides_url >}}/modules/m7-pca/).

---

## Build & Rendering

Slides are rendered locally with:
```bash
./render.sh          # Bootstrap Python 3.11 venv + render all to docs/ (HTML + PDF)
./render.sh html     # HTML only
./render.sh pdf      # PDF only
```

- **Python 3.11–3.13** required (numpy 2.1.x wheels not available for Python 3.14+)
- Output lands in `docs/` (tracked, GitHub Pages convention)
- Self-contained HTML files inline CSS, JS, and figures; KaTeX loaded from CDN (identical version pinned across all decks and activities)

---

## Branding & Notation

All decks use the **University of Arizona color scheme** (Navy #1B4F72, Red #AB0520) and the **Okabe-Ito colorblind-safe palette** for data visualization. Mathematical notation follows **Murphy (PML)** conventions for consistency across the course.
